description: Normal MX-A8W4 weight NZ case with all valid inputs
Verify coreNum/blockDim is set correctly from compileInfo
Null scale should fail
Null pertoken_scale should fail
Null row_index should fail
Null group_list should fail
Wrong x dtype should fail
Wrong w dtype should fail
Wrong scale dtype should fail
transpose_w=false should fail
Wrong x shape (3D instead of 2D) should fail
Wrong w shape (2D instead of 3D) should fail
E mismatch between inputs should fail
K mismatch between inputs should fail
With bias input should succeed
Default output_bs case
Different dimensions (smaller M K N)
Empty bias shape should fail
E=0 and outputBs nullptr should fail
E=0 but with explicit outputBs should succeed
No shared input - initSize should be 64 * 7168 = 458752
Small shared input (bs=32 < outputBS=64) - initSize should be (64-32) * 7168 = 229376
Full shared input (bs=64 = outputBS=64) - initSize should be (64-64) * 7168 = 0
Null shared_input should succeed
K dimension not aligned to 32 should fail
N dimension not aligned to 32 should fail
K dimension less than minimum 64 should fail
N dimension less than minimum 32 should fail
